case_title: MARK LO VS. JOHN EDWARD MICKELSON et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LO, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELSON, JOHN EDWARD DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELSON, JOHN EDWARD
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELSON, JOHN EDWARD
DECLARATION KATHRYN QUETEL FILED RE: ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LO, MARK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LO, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICKELSON, JOHN EDWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2599 34TH AVENUE, #3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELSON, JOHN EDWARD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELSON, JOHN EDWARD
